phase: FAZ 0 -- Stage 0 pre-registration (ic metodoloji notu sec.2)
discipline: Written and frozen BEFORE measurement. Factor definitions, thresholds, horizons, benchmark and snapshot hash must NOT change after results are seen (post-hoc rationalization guard). N=1 single design.

snapshot.universe_note: config-driven current BIST list (57 names available); not a full 100. Sufficient cross-section for rank-IC (>=5/day).

survivorship.reason: not fetchable from yfinance (404) -> survivors-only snapshot
survivorship.bias_direction: Excluding delisted (mostly poor-outcome) names may make measured IC read OPTIMISTIC/inflated; in TEST 2 the missing left tail biases skewness UP (high-vol falsely good). Read Faz 0 as an upper-ish bound, not neutral. (maintainer condition: bias direction MUST be reported.)

rs_vs_xu100.definition: relative strength = stock_return(window) - xu100_return(window); RELATIVE (not absolute nominal, invariant 5).
rs_vs_xu100.orientation: higher RS -> higher rank (momentum hypothesis); standalone IC<=0 -> drop or reversal (Bildik-Gulay).

low_vol.definition: trailing realized volatility of daily log returns.

factors.value: DEFERRED to Faz 0b (market cap / EBITDA / net debt not available in any fetcher; maintainer decision).

composite.rule: equal-weight rank average (invariant 4: no z-score, no weight optimization)

ic_method.metric: Spearman rank-IC (NOT Pearson; keeps TEST 2 orthogonal)
ic_method.equivalence_rule: local daily-IC series asserted == primitive at 5-decimal reporting precision (<1e-9); ic_source recorded primitive|fallback
ic_method.overlap_adjustment: Newey-West HAC t (Bartlett, lags=5) reported alongside naive t for overlapping horizons
ic_method.confidence_interval: t-distribution 95% on the IC series mean

decision_rules.keep_drop: decision rests on STANDALONE rank-IC: keep if mean_ic > 0 AND ICIR >= 0.5
decision_rules.rs_rule: standalone IC <= 0 -> drop OR convert to short-term reversal (EK KARAR 1)
decision_rules.test1_dilution: equal-weight composite IC vs best single-factor IC; composite < best -> dilution flag (narrow factor SET, do not optimize weights)
decision_rules.test2_groupcond_skew: DIAGNOSTIC ONLY (not gating): delta_skew = mean_t[skew(high-vol fwd) - skew(low-vol fwd)] + ex-ante realized skewness (Amaya); significance via block-bootstrap 95% CI (no threshold).

benchmark_reference: max(TUFE TP.FG.J0, TLREF TP.BISTTLREF.KAPANIS); RS/low-vol IC need no deflation (cross-sectional rank removes common inflation drift).
decision_owner: maintainer (DEC-039). Harness MEASURES and RECOMMENDS; does not finalize factor set.
config_budget: N=1 (single frozen design; no variant sweep -- MinBTL/overfitting guard, SPEC sec.2)
